name: San Patricio
note: High-advantage side repeatedly featured in federation coverage during the 2025 Triple Corona window.
achievement: Won Copa El Recuerdo 2025 and reached the final of the 83rd Abierto Argentino.
profile: One of the clearest headline teams in the current top tier. San Patricio appears across the Triple Corona narrative as a title contender with repeated late-season visibility.
latestHighlight: Beat El Siasgo 14–13 to win Copa El Recuerdo, then remained central to the Abierto Argentino title race.
sourceTitle: SAN PATRICIO es el Campeón de la Copa El Recuerdo / EL SIASGO ES EL TRICAMPEÓN ARGENTINO!!
momentumLabel: Strong late-season form with repeated appearances in headline title matches.

name: El Siasgo
note: A flagship modern side in federation coverage and one of the most visible names in high-advantage competition.
achievement: Won the 83rd Abierto Argentino in December 2025.
profile: El Siasgo is presented as one of the strongest elite teams of the season, regularly facing the highest-level opponents and appearing in decisive championship matches.
latestHighlight: Won the 83rd Abierto Argentino final 14–13 on golden goal after a 13–13 deadlock through regulation.
sourceTitle: EL SIASGO ES EL TRICAMPEÓN ARGENTINO!!
momentumLabel: Championship-winning momentum after closing the season with the biggest title in the bundle.

name: El Relincho – La Estrella – El Fogón
note: Triple-combination lineup used in late-2025 high-advantage competition coverage.
achievement: Won the resumed decisive Copa Argentina match in December 2025.
profile: A combined roster built around recognizable names from multiple organizations, used in top-tier event coverage where competition lineups are often assembled for specific tournaments.
latestHighlight: Beat San Patricio 18–16 in the resumed decisive Copa Argentina match.
sourceTitle: Final pendiente de la COPA ARGENTINA / San Patricio se adjudicó la Copa Argentina...
momentumLabel: High-impact tournament lineup with proven ability to win marquee knockout-style matches.

name: El Relincho Linaje Pampa
note: Second El Relincho-associated lineup highlighted before and during Copa Argentina coverage.
achievement: Reached the Copa Argentina closing rounds window in 2025 coverage.
profile: Used as a competitive El Relincho branch in federation reporting, this side is part of the wider Rawson competitive network appearing across multiple 2025 events.
latestHighlight: Pushed San Patricio despite a major comeback loss, falling 24–21 in a featured Copa Argentina clash.
sourceTitle: Final pendiente de la COPA ARGENTINA entre San Patricio VS Relincho – Estrella – Fogón
momentumLabel: Competitive but just below the top closing power of the leading title sides.

name: Chascomús – La Tribu
note: A regularly referenced side in classification coverage for the Abierto Argentino.
achievement: Added key classification points before the 83rd Abierto Argentino final stage.
profile: This Chascomús-based combination appears as a serious competitive roster capable of affecting classification and qualification stories before the biggest championship rounds.
latestHighlight: Beat El Relincho – La Estrella – El Fogón 16–10 in classification play before the Abierto final stage.
sourceTitle: Chascomús – La Tribu y San Patricio, suman puntos en la Clasificación del Abierto Argentino
momentumLabel: Solid classification-phase form and useful visibility in late-season top competition.

name: El Parque – Las Heras
note: Composite low-advantage lineup repeatedly visible in national tournament reporting.
achievement: Won Torneo Argentino de Baja Ventaja 2025.
profile: A successful combined side from Las Heras that stands out in lower-advantage national play, where balanced handicap structures drive the competition format.
latestHighlight: Won the Baja Ventaja final 13–12 over Las Heras – La Carreta.
sourceTitle: El Parque – Las Heras se consagró Campeón del Torneo Argentino de Baja Ventaja
momentumLabel: Excellent form within baja ventaja competition after converting a close final.

name: El Parque – Los Gurises
note: Listed among the official participants of Copa Capital Nacional 2025.
achievement: Confirmed participant in Copa Capital Nacional 2025.
profile: This roster is known in the app primarily through participant lists rather than deep result coverage, but it helps map the broader club ecosystem active around Las Heras events.
latestHighlight: Included in the official six-team Copa Capital Nacional participant announcement.
sourceTitle: Fin de semana a puro PATO!! Copa Capital, Show en vivo, Exhibición Criollos y mucho más..
momentumLabel: Visible in event entry lists, but without enough bundled score data to push the rating higher.

name: El Fogón
note: Appears both as a standalone side and as part of combination lineups in 2025 coverage.
achievement: Featured in Copa Capital Nacional and Gardella semifinal coverage.
profile: El Fogón is one of the more flexible names in the current ecosystem, appearing independently in some tournaments and as part of multi-club combinations in others.
latestHighlight: Lost 14.5–8 to Sociedad Rural de Venado Tuerto in a Gardella semifinal after also appearing in Copa Capital reporting.
sourceTitle: La Sociedad Rural de Venado Tuerto resultó Campeón en Chivilcoy / Resultados de la Copa Capital Nacional...
momentumLabel: Active presence across events, though recent bundled results lean more mixed than dominant.

name: San Patricio LH
note: A local Las Heras branch lineup named in Copa Capital competition.
achievement: Beat Gral. Las Heras 12–11 in Copa Capital provisional results.
profile: A localized San Patricio competition roster that reflects how clubs and sub-lineups are organized for specific event formats and regional windows.
latestHighlight: Opened Copa Capital provisional results with a narrow 12–11 win over Gral. Las Heras.
sourceTitle: Resultados de la Copa Capital Nacional y Liga Femenina de Pato
momentumLabel: Positive short-form event momentum after a close official result win.

name: El Relincho La Francesa

sourceTitle: SAN PATRICIO La Blanquita es el CAMPEÓN del Torneo Remonta y Veterinaria.
